hooks.command: root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}"; [ -f "$root/.codex-plugin/plugin.json" ] && [ -f "$root/core/goal_guard.py" ] || exit 0; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" hook SessionStart; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $root = if ($env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '.' }; if (-not (Test-Path "$root\.codex-plugin\plugin.json") -or -not (Test-Path "$root\core\goal_guard.py")) { exit 0 }; python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook SessionStart }

hooks.command: root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}"; [ -f "$root/.codex-plugin/plugin.json" ] && [ -f "$root/core/goal_guard.py" ] || exit 0; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" hook UserPromptSubmit; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $root = if ($env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '.' }; if (-not (Test-Path "$root\.codex-plugin\plugin.json") -or -not (Test-Path "$root\core\goal_guard.py")) { exit 0 }; $input | python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook UserPromptSubmit }

hooks.command: root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}"; [ -f "$root/.codex-plugin/plugin.json" ] && [ -f "$root/core/goal_guard.py" ] || exit 0; tmp=$(mktemp); trap 'rm -f "$tmp"' EXIT; cat > "$tmp"; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" policy-gate --root . --hook < "$tmp"; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then exit "$rc"; fi; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" publish-gate --root . --hook < "$tmp"; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then exit "$rc"; fi; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" hook PreToolUse; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $root = if ($env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '.' }; if (-not (Test-Path "$root\.codex-plugin\plugin.json") -or -not (Test-Path "$root\core\goal_guard.py")) { exit 0 }; $tmp = New-TemporaryFile; $input | Set-Content -Path $tmp; Get-Content $tmp | python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" policy-gate --root . --hook; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $rc = $LASTEXITCODE; Remove-Item $tmp; exit $rc }; Get-Content $tmp | python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" publish-gate --root . --hook; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $rc = $LASTEXITCODE; Remove-Item $tmp; exit $rc }; python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook PreToolUse; Remove-Item $tmp }

hooks.command: root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}"; [ -f "$root/.codex-plugin/plugin.json" ] && [ -f "$root/core/goal_guard.py" ] || exit 0; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" hook PostToolUse; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $root = if ($env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '.' }; if (-not (Test-Path "$root\.codex-plugin\plugin.json") -or -not (Test-Path "$root\core\goal_guard.py")) { exit 0 }; python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook PostToolUse }

hooks.command: root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}"; [ -f "$root/.codex-plugin/plugin.json" ] && [ -f "$root/core/goal_guard.py" ] || exit 0; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" completion-gate --root . >&2; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then exit "$rc"; fi; python3 "$root/core/goal_guard.py" hook Stop; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $root = if ($env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '.' }; if (-not (Test-Path "$root\.codex-plugin\plugin.json") -or -not (Test-Path "$root\core\goal_guard.py")) { exit 0 }; python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" completion-gate --root . 1>&2; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; python "$root\core\goal_guard.py" hook Stop }
